title: Premier Housewares Picnic Blanket Hamper Baskets For Gifts Picnic Basket Purple Gingham Lining Wicker Basket Bread Basket Woven Basket 35 X 17 X 14
features: Features of gift basket, double handles with a removable and machine washable luxury lining;
Chic and practical way to store, and organise your cutlery and food in the wicker basket;
Care instructions:Washing to be done by wiping clean with a soft cloth, do not use abrasive cleaners;
Dimensions for wicker baskets for hampers: (W x D x H): 35 x 17 x 14 cm
description: The multi-purpose willow basket, with its stylish purple Gingham lining, is a charming solution for storing your books magazine or food. The dark willow weave design is not only decorative to look at, but gives the basket its strength and durability and makes sure that it remains sturdy. Two sets of dual handles are securely attached allowing you to carry the basket with ease. Giving the basket a more appealing style is the purple and white Gingham lining that is machine washable allowing you to display the basket with pride. A chic heart design hangs of the handle, adding to its already eye-catching look. So whether you want to keep your essentials close to hand or display and transport food, the beauty of the charming willow basket will give the style and practicality you require. Even empty this natural basket has its own shabby charm and would look beautiful on your shelves. The light weight basket can be used to carry out your shopping items when in the market. These would look elegant at the picnic table displayed with: cake, flower, cheese board, coffee and sweets. These could be used to put so many things in such as: meat,jam, candy,beer bottles,egg,biscuit,chocolate,tea,fruit and vegetables like onions. It can also be placed in the bathroom to put baby pamper in as well as your laundry clothes, making the bathroom look clean. These are a perfect gift to give at: - christmas - valentines - mothers day - birthday You could create a personalised basket by putting things of your own choice.
